title: Aitmexcn Dog Rope Toys for Large Medium Breed Chewers – 37 Inch 5 Knots Indestructible Dog Chew Toys, Tough Tug of War Rope for Teeth Cleaning, Interactive Play
features: Indestructible Dog Rope Toy – 95 cm/37-inch rope with 5 knots,Weight 760g, perfect for large and medium breed chewers and aggressive chewers. Tough and durable for hours of chewing fun.
Safe and Healthy Chewing – Made from 100% natural cotton.Let your dog chew freely while keeping them happy and healthy with this indestructible dog chew toy.
Fun Tug of War and Interactive Play – Strong, sturdy rope ideal for tug of war, interactive play, and bonding with your dog. Keep them entertained and reduce boredom or anxiety.
Chew and Clean Teeth – Your dog can chew and clean their teeth at the same time. Helps massage gums, promote oral health, and makes playtime both fun and beneficial.
Indoor and Outdoor Fun – Colourful, eye-catching rope for indoor and outdoor play. Perfect to spoil your furry friend and keep them active whether at home or in the garden.
Tips: Always supervise your dog while playing and rotate their toys regularly. This keeps your dog engaged, prevents boredom, and helps the indestructible dog chew toy last longer.
description: Product Description Specification Size : 95 cm / 37 inch (with 5 knots) Color: blue + green + red Material: 100% natural cotton Why Choose AITMEXCN Dog Rope Toy? AITMEXCN XXL Tough Dog Rope Toy Great Fun - this rope toy is perfect for indoor and outdoor, tug of war, throwing and other fun games for dogs. Machine Washable and Durable - our rope toy adopts 100% natural cotton material, which is washable when being dirty. Indestructible and tough rope toy - long rope toy with large knots would be more durable. Please note: if your furry friends are extremely aggressive, please play under your supervision to a longer life for the rope toy. 100% NATURAL COTTON Our dog chew toy is made of 100% natural cotton, non-toxic, tasteless and safer. STRONG BIG KNOT This 95 cm/ 37 inch XXL long dog rope toy with 5 knots is designed for medium and large dogs, durable and indestructible.
